checks.finding: Every corrected freeze, policy, code, test, and preregistration identity matches.
checks.name: corrected_artifact_identity

checks.finding: The original ten-artifact I04 package remains byte-exact history and cannot govern progression.
checks.name: historical_I04_retention

checks.finding: The accepted RCAE/PyGRC baselines are exact and all three unranked modes remain retained.
checks.name: accepted_baseline_and_three_modes

evidence.derived_comparator: maximum oriented response of both leave-one branches within mode, seed, and physical order

leave_one_branches.matched_source_activity: q2 source debit/activity preserved through matched inert-sink diversion
q1 source debit/activity preserved through matched inert-sink diversion

matching_duties: q1 and q2 physical amount, type, event-relative timing, cost, and source debit
route class, latency, capacity, support, neutral contact, opportunity, response policy, and B baseline
only common-carrier admission versus matched inert-sink diversion differs
evidence.raw_retention: candidate, both leave-one responses, selected maximum, and margin retained per mode/seed/order
evidence.reason: fixed strongest-marginal comparison resolves source asymmetry, preserves both source activities, changes the mode-relevant carrier, and is not selected from observed effect size

checks.finding: The primary contrast changes the carrier, retains both symmetric leave-one arms, and uses a frozen strongest-marginal rule.
checks.name: carrier_changing_symmetric_primary

evidence.R03_effect: numerical equivalence alone has none; full single-source explanation requires evidence that the actual candidate lacked two-source constitution or bypassed the common carrier
evidence.divergence_relation: retained as a source-role/contribution-structure scope qualification and checked against carrier equality
evidence.equivalence_relation: allowed and expected when the complete causal carrier is identical
preserve: q1 and q2 amount, type, target-carrier operation, and physical order
total source-side cost/depletion, support, timing, opportunity, policy, and B baseline
complete mode-relevant carrier when source-role physics permits
evidence.source_symmetry_registration: each source must independently emit both q operations with matched route class, cost, reserve, capacity, support, and eligibility

checks.finding: Repeated-S1 and repeated-S2 remain physical-order-indexed scope diagnostics; equivalence cannot fail R03.
checks.name: symmetric_nonfailing_scope_diagnostic

evidence.causal_failure_separation: not_top_aligned never by itself means mode_hypothesis_failed; carrier-chain and mandatory-control evidence decide causal failure
evidence.mixed_direction: at least one margin exceeds delta and at least one is below negative delta
evidence.narrow_aligned: at least one margin exceeds delta, none is below negative delta, and not all exceed delta
evidence.narrow_counter: at least one margin is below negative delta, none exceeds delta, and not all are below negative delta
evidence.not_applicable: only by separately reviewed control rationale
evidence.order_conditioned_or_mixed: at least one order has a resolved non-resolution relation and OP-08 passes while the other differs, is resolution-limited, or is counter-directional
evidence.per_mode_panel: six margins retained as two separate per-order panels
evidence.per_order_seed_panel: three margins within one mode and physical order
evidence.resolution_limited: every absolute margin is at most delta
evidence.resolution_unknown: delta unavailable or a required response operationally not evaluable
evidence.robust_counter: every margin is below negative delta

checks.finding: A nonaligned history/hybrid order can retain an order-conditioned or mixed metric relation without automatic causal failure.
checks.name: order_conditioned_metric_separation

calibrates: deterministic exact-rational parsing and float conversion
byte reconstruction through the same pure entry point
does_not_calibrate: runtime, restoration, or continuation equality tolerance

checks.finding: The future I05 null calibrates only pure analysis arithmetic/serialization and explicitly excludes runtime/measurement tolerance.
checks.name: analysis_only_null_scope

evidence.failure_effect: configuration cannot register; analysis-floor or response changes reopen I04/I05
evidence.packet_amount_rule: r >= 1024*raw_floor and r >= 1024*max(ulp(B_before), ulp(B_before+r)) for every branch
evidence.roundtrip_rule: B_before, r, and B_before+r finite and canonical-JSON round-trippable; recomputed gain positive
evidence.runtime_tolerance_rule: every separately registered runtime/restoration/continuation tolerance is less than r/1024 and is never inferred from analysis_arithmetic_delta

checks.finding: I06 must reject response configurations outside the floor/ULP/roundtrip/separate-tolerance domain.
checks.name: I06_numeric_domain

static_findings: feedback-surface emission records live-state evidence and does not mutate coherence or enqueue work
produce_events schedules eligible work and does not process packet coherence changes
the feedback producer schedules exactly one departure event when eligible
step processes exactly one earliest deterministic queued event or returns an empty-queue result
arrival local update can schedule outbound routes, so B must have no causal flux route in the scientific window
departure debits the packet source and queues its arrival
arrival adds exactly packet.amount to the target coherence
with an initially empty queue and no other producers, two step calls process the response departure then arrival

window.operational_exception_policy: null response and operationally invalid; never scientific zero

checks.finding: Exact admitted public-source semantics support one producer evaluation plus two fixed steps for every outcome.
checks.name: outcome_independent_native_window

evidence.definition: native B coherence after the fixed six-slot response protocol minus matched native B coherence before that protocol
evidence.purity_failure: registration blocked; changing to packet-attributable or background-subtracted response reopens I04/I05
purity_postconditions: packet and boundary-birth queues empty after the window
scheduled response has exactly one linked A-to-B departure and B arrival
unscheduled/native-block response has no response packet and no B change
no other event targets or changes B
purity_preconditions: packet and boundary-birth queues empty before the window
B distinct from B_ref and every response front-mask carrier
B baseline and response configuration exactly paired
B has no causal flux route, balancing operation, background update, or topology integration
neutral contact and M_H materialization complete before B_before
evidence.value_semantics: 0 or one fixed registered response-packet amount; this measures native response scheduling-and-arrival occurrence rather than graded magnitude

window_protocol.operational_exception_policy: null response and operationally invalid; never scientific zero

checks.finding: B gain is a binary-like response occurrence measure and can register only when the response arrival is B's sole possible change.
checks.name: B_purity_and_binary_response

independent_per_mode: six primary margins and raw branches

checks.finding: Shared extraction identity does not pool, average, compensate, drop, or jointly verdict the three modes.
checks.name: per_mode_evidence_isolation

candidate_requirements: two distinct source-role arrivals target the registered common carrier
response front mask equals the registered mode-specific common carrier mask and excludes source roles/private cross-reads
native feedback producer record links to one A-to-B packet departure and arrival
RCAE/adapter response-phase calls contain no forbidden direct response or contributor-addressed read
evidence.controller_exclusion: recorded response-phase calls or inputs expose direct scheduling, contributor-slot reads, authored success, or controller aggregation
evidence.private_exclusion: each legitimate response mask is contained in exactly one registered private partition; no mask spans partitions or common aggregate

checks.finding: Candidate/private/controller status is derived from masks, arrivals, calls, packet lineage, configuration, and receipts—not authored success booleans or output inequality.
checks.name: evidence_derived_causal_controls

common.effect: both marginal responses remain visible; neither may be silently promoted to the combined response
common.held_fixed: opportunity, support, fixed response window, response policy, and the retained source's registered contribution operation

common.effect: failure blocks attribution-only invariance and R04
common.held_fixed: all contribution physics, causal carrier state/history, physical order, routes, support, opportunity, and response configuration

common.effect: divergence is diagnostic and cannot be called label-control failure
common.held_fixed: explicitly not a pure-label intervention; changed amount, location, timing, type, or route is retained

common.effect: owns the corrected primary margin; a non-top metric relation is retained separately from carrier-chain or mode-hypothesis failure
common.held_fixed: both source activities/debits, q1/q2 physics and physical order, route class, support, opportunity, response policy, and B baseline; one q is diverted to a matched inert sink in each symmetric arm

common.effect: failure to remove or change the candidate carrier relation blocks the affected R03/R04 causal claim
common.held_fixed: source activity/debit, lineage, support, opportunity, and response configuration while common-carrier admission is prevented

common.effect: a mask spanning private partitions or reading a common aggregate blocks R04
common.held_fixed: marginal writes, route class, timing, support, and access opportunity; each legitimate private response mask remains within one partition

common.effect: forbidden scheduling, contributor-addressed read, or authored-success provenance excludes the branch even if outputs match or differ
common.held_fixed: nearest output opportunity and complete raw response retention

common.effect: carrier-matched equivalence is valid and cannot alone fail R03; divergence qualifies source-role/contribution scope
common.held_fixed: q1/q2 physics and physical order, full carrier when source-role physics permits, total source cost/depletion, support, opportunity, response policy, and B baseline; repeated-S1 and repeated-S2 both retained

common.effect: pass permits bounded R05 access retention only
common.held_fixed: common carrier, contributions, support, policy class, fixed response window, and non-private mask; responder role and registered reserve/route are the contrast

history_carried.relation: equal marginal quantities with different ordered H_P produce different later responses
P is excluded from the history-carried V path
response tracks active H_P through native M_H

hybrid.relation: retain raw responses for candidate_P/candidate_H, reference_P/candidate_H, candidate_P/reference_H, and reference_P/reference_H with exact held-fixed component identities
full candidate differs from reference_P/candidate_H while H_P/M_H remains fixed
full candidate differs from candidate_P/reference_H while P remains fixed
equal P with different active H_P/M_H changes the same native joint response
retain any interaction diagnostic but impose no nonlinearity, synergy, irreducibility, or superadditivity requirement

state_carried.relation: responses are invariant when complete native P state is equal
response tracks the intervened native P state
audit order and lineage cannot enter V

checks.finding: All nine common and 3/3/5 mode-specific controls retain exact machine rules; the two corrected common roles changed without losing any imported control.
checks.name: complete_machine_control_registry

evidence.B_response: pre-runtime contracts freeze native later A-to-B transition; public source shows arrival changes B
evidence.control_derivation: accepted causal-factorization and mailbox/controller exclusions require evidence-linked paths
evidence.fixed_window: public source shows producer scheduling plus one departure and one arrival event
evidence.physical_orders: accepted history/hybrid causal contracts require order-sensitive carrier tests
evidence.primary_comparator: accepted brief requires carrier-changing contributor/freeze controls and permits quantity-matched equivalence
